# Sitecore Marketplace SDK

> TypeScript pnpm monorepo for the Sitecore Marketplace SDK. It provides a secure host-client transport layer (`core`), a public query and mutation SDK (`client`), typed XM Cloud and AI extensions (`xmc`, `ai`), and shared OpenAPI generation plugins (`shared`).

Important notes:

- Prefer editing hand-written source over generated output.
- Generated API client files in `packages/xmc/src/**` and `packages/ai/src/**` are not the source of truth; use the generator scripts and shared plugins instead.
- Follow `CONTRIBUTING.md` for PR workflow and changesets.
- Package manager is `pnpm`.

## Core Docs

- [Repository README](README.md): Monorepo overview, package layout, installation, and root commands.
- [Contribution Guide](CONTRIBUTING.md): Contribution workflow, tests, changesets, and code of conduct.
- [Docs Overview](docs/README.md): Generated API reference entry point.

## Package Guides

- [Core README](packages/core/README.md): Low-level host-client communication package.
- [Client README](packages/client/README.md): Public Marketplace SDK query and mutation layer.
- [XMC README](packages/xmc/README.md): XM Cloud module integration and typed APIs.
- [AI README](packages/ai/README.md): AI Skills module integration and typed APIs.

## Source of Truth

- [Core SDK source](packages/core/src/index.ts): Public Core SDK class and exports.
- [Client SDK source](packages/client/src/client.ts): Main client behavior and query/mutation flow.
- [XMC module entry point](packages/xmc/src/index.ts): Generated module exports and module wiring.
- [AI module entry point](packages/ai/src/index.ts): Generated module exports and module wiring.
- [Shared helpers](packages/shared/src/index.ts): Shared utilities used by module generation and experimental clients.

## Generation and Codegen

- [XMC generator](packages/xmc/generate-xmc.ts): Source of truth for XM Cloud generated modules.
- [AI generator](packages/ai/generate-ai.ts): Source of truth for AI generated modules.
- [Shared plugins](packages/shared/plugins/augmentation/plugin.ts): Augmentation generation rules.
- [Shared plugins](packages/shared/plugins/schema-patcher/plugin.ts): Schema patching and operation filtering rules.

## Optional

- [Experimental XMC guide](docs/experimental-xmc.md): Direct server-to-server usage guidance.
- [Experimental AI guide](docs/experimental-ai.md): Direct AI usage guidance.
- [Core SDK reference docs](docs/core-sdk/README.md): Generated API reference for the core package.
